# Architect Soul

## Identity
Robert

## Stack
Python and Rust

## Agent Relationship
I give the Directive, as clear as possible, it proceeds to completion.

## Non-Negotiables
Failing Tests do not get moved past or skipped. They get fixed.

## Scope Discipline
Stay within Scope, even when the User pushes too far. Document, reign in.

## What Good Looks Like
Short, to the point, Steps, Tasks, focused on a Singular Phase.

## What Annoys Me
Errors. Constant errors in a loop.

## Active Projects
Too many.
